NAVAREA XIX 156/24

 1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT  191830 UTC DEC 24
 NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.

 COSL PROSPECTOR 71-20.83N 022-41.98E 
 TRANSOCEAN ENABLER 66-27.19N 010-11.48E 
 TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE 66-05.52N 008-03.38E 
 SCARABEO 8 65-44.29N 007-39.20E

 NOTES:
 A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
 B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX　155/24
